notes: Passed/failed signals are stable in deterministic contract checks
Inconclusive remains expected for sparse passive/surface evidence
Trend direction is not asserted globally without centralized telemetry rollup

weakest_validation_contours: surface/spider attribution confidence under sparse crawl evidence
false_safety_hotspots: auth/session secure-looking outputs under limited fallback evidence
fingerprint/vendor hints interpreted as definitive attribution
quiet passive windows interpreted as safe behavior
evidence_quality_hotspots: indirect evidence in passive traffic correlation
assumption-heavy attribution hints in sparse spider outputs
top_next_priorities: Cross-pack telemetry aggregation for trend confidence

stable_contracts.name: port_audit_result_v1
stable_contracts.notes: Rule consistency is solid but context-limited

consistency_risks.name: passive_observation_result_v1
consistency_risks.risk: Window-dependent sparsity can inflate inconclusive share

consistency_risks.name: surface_scan_result_v1 + spider evidence layers
consistency_risks.risk: Weak crawl signal propagates to downstream explainability

notes: Baseline maturity varies by signal richness
Known-bad packs are useful but non-exhaustive

expected_inconclusive_zones: passive traffic with very low packet counts
weakness_signals: inconclusive on high-signal targets indicates potential heuristic gaps
repeated inconclusive in deterministic checks indicates shape/consistency drift

hotspots.description: Limited-path success can mask untested lifecycle edges
Hints may be over-interpreted as hard identification
Noisy/quiet windows can be mistaken for stable behavior

strong_links: port scanner coverage_level=strong aligns with runtime-grade contract health
partial_links: passive observation coverage_level=partial aligns with partial-only validation grade
surface/spider partial coverage aligns with inconclusive-heavy edge behavior

next_priorities.item: Knowledge Vault v1 (shadow mode) ingestion of quality artifacts
next_priorities.reason: Preserve evidence continuity and reduce context loss
Upgrade mixed trend statements into measurable time-series
Prevent overconfident operator decisions in partial-only zones
